qa_pairs.question: Which compute clusters were recently retired as part of the infrastructure upgrade, and what are their corresponding new replacement systems for submitting jobs?
qa_pairs.answer: The Mist compute cluster was retired on September 16, 2025, with users advised to transition new work to Trillium. The Cedar compute cluster was retired on September 12, 2025, and users should submit jobs to other new national infrastructure, including Fir. The Graham compute cluster was retired on September 1, 2025, and users should submit jobs to other new national infrastructure, including Nibi.

qa_pairs.question: For users of the recently retired Cedar and Graham compute clusters, what is the process for accessing their stored data on the new infrastructure?
qa_pairs.answer: Files previously stored on the Cedar cluster are already available on Fir, and files from the Graham cluster are available on Nibi. This is because these pairs of clusters share the same file systems, meaning no action is required from users regarding their stored files.
